race.description: Evergreen Turf Southern Country Champs Wild Card (C5)
race.comment: AUTUMN BREAK (9) resumed as favourite with a narrow defeat in a Randwick Highway and then was backed off the map, narrowly beaten this grade at Wagga. Maps for the run of the race and Heywood rides for the first time. Rates strongly and is the one to beat. CRUSADER KINGS (4) strode forward early from his wide draw to settle just off the lead to score by 1.5 lengths at Dubbo over 1200m. Maps for a sweet run and he looks right in it. BENGAL (10) can't be taken lightly. Impressed at Randwick and Canterbury before being outgraded at the Sapphire Coast. Needs a good ride but his best form stacks right up. SIR FRANKLIN (7) races forward and extended well to win a 66 here over 1300m heavily bet. Was beaten 2L over 1000m in a Randwick Highway first-up prior, and he will be further improved. Draws wide and that's a niggle. EVERIDO (5) will be around the mark forgiving the latest.
